channel.title: VBA on bubka hacks stuff
channel.description: Recent content in VBA on bubka hacks stuff

item.title: LD-Malicious File Download Attempt
item.description: A malicious DOCM file was blocked on download at NicolasPRD. VirusTotal confirmed 38/65 detections with an AutoOpen macro that downloads and executes a PowerShell payload. No C2 contact was made.

item.title: LD-Detected Suspicious Xls File
item.description: A user executed a malicious XLSM file that exploited CVE-2017-11882 via the Equation Editor, dropped and ran an obfuscated VBS payload hidden in an NTFS alternate data stream, and connected to a Brazilian C2 domain flagged by 8/91 VirusTotal vendors.

item.title: LD-Malicious Macro Executed
item.description: A phishing email from jake.admin@cybercommunity.info delivered a ZIP-archived Word macro document, which executed a PowerShell downloader fetching messbox.exe from greyhathacker.net. The host Jayne was contained after execution was confirmed.

item.title: ELK-Black Basta
item.description: A finance employee opened a malicious Excel macro from a drive-by download, which executed a VBS dropper, loaded WindowsUpdaterFX.dll via regsvr32, established persistence, dropped Pancake.jpg.exe as a C2 backdoor, performed internal reconnaissance, laterally moved to a domain controller via PsExec using compromised credentials, exfiltrated client data to MEGA via rclone, deleted shadow copies, and deployed BlackBasta ransomware.

item.title: CDEF-Obfuscated
item.description: A malicious Word document uses a password-protected AutoOpen macro to drop and execute js script, which decrypts an embedded blob into stage2.js. It is a implant that establishes persistence via a hidden scheduled task, collects system reconnaissance, and beacons to two compromised WordPress C2 servers, downloading and executing a next-stage .pif payload

item.title: HTB-oBfsC4t10n
item.description: A phishing HTML file masquerading as an invoice delivers a macro-enabled Excel workbook that drops and executes a multi-stage obfuscated HTA payload, ultimately injecting a reverse shell shellcode into rundll32.exe and establishing a C2 connection.
